data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Interface designed to make the most frequently used actions easily accessible.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimized decision-making time by simplifying choices within the app.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menu options, intuitive chat functions

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Content is organized in a way that users can easily remember different elements.
data.technical_spec: Chunking of contact and chat information, consistent UI patterns

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: The design aligns with user expectations derived from other similar platforms.
data.technical_spec: Consistent with social media and messaging app conventions

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements placed close together appear as related, enhancing user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Grouped message threads, proximity-based notification settings
